productDisplayName: Puma Men Poly Knitted Navy Blue Tracksuit
description: CompositionBlue tracksuit made of 100% polyesterFull sleeve front zippered track jacket, with brand name and logo embroidered on the left chest, side pockets and ribbed sleeve cuffs and hem  track pants with three stripes along the side seams in shades of white, zippered side pockets, comfortable elastic waistband with an inner drawstring, and brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg  FittingRegular  Wash careGentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach or tumble dry   in shadeCool ironDo not iron on prints/trims/embroideryDo not dry clean  It's true that you can throw on a pair of shorts and t-shirt to go running, but try this track suit from puma and you will never think of wearing anything else for your cross-training purposes! Engineered with sweat wicking technology, this track suit draws sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Team this sporty track suit with performance shoes and get going for a fitter, leaner you!  Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18.5" and waist 32&rdquo
